title: Expedition 73
description: Expedition 73 began on April 19, 2025, and ends in December. The crew welcomed the Axiom Mission-4 crew and the SpaceX Crew-11 mission while continuing to conduct advanced space research.
text:
Crew Members
Alexey Zubritsky, Flight Engineer
Sergey Ryzhikov, Commander
Jonny Kim, Flight Engineer
Kimiya Yui, Flight Engineer
Oleg Platonov, Flight Engineer
Zena Cardman, Flight Engineer
Mike Fincke, Flight Engineer
